g.text: truST Runtime: Bytecode, Scheduler, and Simulation Engine
(PC loop + op dispatch + debug hook emit)
• dispatches directly to the VM path
• required SHM create/open failure => startup abort
• required page pinning failure => startup abort
2. scheduler applies swap at cycle boundary
• web auth required for session bootstrap
• writes allowed only in debug mode
• accept loop + HTTP lifecycle in web/server.rs
• route handlers split by concern in web/*_routes.rs
• Alias chains resolve to the underlying
• missing, extra, or wrongly typed fields
return diagnostics at the entry point
• Alias chains resolve before checking element type
• retained dimensions must match declared bounds
• element count and each element value type
are checked before storing the value
goes directly through the VM path.
If { condition, then_block, else_if, else_block, location }
For { control, start, end, step, body, location }
Add, Sub, Mul, Div, Mod, Pow
Eq, Ne, Lt, Le, Gt, Ge
3. Production execution dispatches directly into the VM after module materialization
4. Bytecode VM is the only production execution backend
